items.name: ng-utils
items.title: Utils (Angular)
items.description: Shared utilities for the Angular edition - cn() helper that merges Tailwind class names with conflict resolution (clsx + tailwind-merge).

items.name: ng-button
items.title: Button (Angular)
items.description: Button primitive for the Angular edition - 6 variants x 4 sizes.

items.name: ng-scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area (Angular)
items.description: Themeable overlay scroll container (gr-scroll-area) built on ngx-scrollbar, with the Gremorie look - thin, rounded, --border thumb.

items.name: ng-card
items.title: Card (Angular)
items.description: Compound surface for grouping related content - Card root with Header, Title, Description, Action, Content and Footer slots. Mirrors React Card from @gremorie/rx-display. Companion to Spartan-ng (fills the Card gap).

items.name: ng-badge
items.title: Badge (Angular)
items.description: Compact label for status, counts and tags - 6 variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline, ghost, link). Token-driven so theme changes propagate automatically. Mirrors React Badge from @gremorie/rx-display. Companion to Spartan-ng (fills the Badge gap).

items.name: ng-carousel
items.title: Carousel (Angular)
items.description: Horizontal (or vertical) slide region built on the framework-agnostic embla-carousel core - drag, keyboard navigation, prev/next controls. Five parts: gr-carousel + content + item + previous + next. Mirrors React Carousel from @gremorie/rx-display (shadcn pattern).

items.name: ng-featured-icon
items.title: Featured Icon (Angular)
items.description: Icon inside a styled, themed container - the small badge that anchors a card, artifact, or empty-state header. Variants: color (primary, gray, success, error) x theme (light, solid, outline) x size (sm, md, lg, xl) x shape (square, circle). Mirrors React FeaturedIcon from @gremorie/rx-display.

items.name: ng-item
items.title: Item (Angular)
items.description: Flexible list-row primitive (compound) - media, title, description, and actions on one line. A single cascading size (lg/md/sm/none) drives media size and title/description typography at once; media variants icon/featured/avatar/image. Mirrors React Item from @gremorie/rx-display.

items.name: ng-spinner
items.title: Spinner (Angular)
items.description: Indeterminate loading indicator - rotating SVG glyph in three sizes (sm, default, lg). Use when duration is unknown; use Progress when percent is known. Companion to Spartan-ng (fills the Spinner gap).

items.name: ng-alert
items.title: Alert (Angular)
items.description: In-flow feedback message - Alert root with AlertTitle and AlertDescription sub-components. Two variants (default, destructive). Convey intent through a leading SVG icon as the first child. Mirrors React Alert from @gremorie/rx-feedback.

items.name: ng-progress
items.title: Progress (Angular)
items.description: Determinate progress bar (0-100) wrapping Spartan-ng brain Progress with the Gremorie visual surface. Pass value=null for indeterminate. Mirrors React Progress from @gremorie/rx-feedback.

items.name: ng-skeleton
items.title: Skeleton (Angular)
items.description: Placeholder block for loading states - a pulsing rectangle that reserves layout while data is fetched. Shape with width/height utility classes. Mirrors React Skeleton from @gremorie/rx-feedback.

items.name: ng-attachments
items.title: Attachments (Angular)
items.description: Composable Attachment* family - List, Item, Preview, Info, Name, Size, Remove, Empty - plus type and util files. Lays out file attachments for chat surfaces.

items.name: ng-prompt-input
items.title: Prompt Input (Angular)
items.description: PromptInput family for AI chat surfaces - state machine (ready -> submitted -> streaming -> error), drag-drop, paste-to-attach. Ships textarea, submit, toolbar, tools, action-menu, model-select sub-components that compose together.

items.name: ng-message
items.title: Message (Angular)
items.description: Message family for chat bubbles - root + content, avatar, actions, toolbar, attachments, response. Includes branch sub-family (controllable picker over alternative responses).

items.name: ng-conversation
items.title: Conversation (Angular)
items.description: Scrollable chat log with auto-stick-to-bottom behavior, empty state and a scroll-to-bottom pill that appears when the user scrolls up.

items.name: ng-suggestion
items.title: Suggestion (Angular)
items.description: Suggestion chips for AI prompts - horizontal scrollable Suggestions container with rounded-full Suggestion buttons that emit `(select)` carrying the value.

items.name: ng-shimmer
items.title: Shimmer (Angular)
items.description: Standalone directive that applies a sweeping gradient animation to text - used for streaming/loading states. Same visual effect as the rx-ai counterpart (motion/react), implemented natively with CSS keyframes (no runtime motion lib).

items.name: ng-reasoning
items.title: Reasoning (Angular)
items.description: Collapsible "thinking..." block with auto-open while streaming, auto-close once streaming ends and duration tracking. Composes Reasoning + ReasoningTrigger + ReasoningContent, built on @spartan-ng/brain/collapsible.

items.name: ng-inline-citation
items.title: Inline Citation (Angular)
items.description: Footnote-style inline citation marker. Hover reveals a hover-card with the source detail; multiple sources compose a Carousel. Built on @spartan-ng/brain hover-card plus gr-badge. Composes InlineCitation, InlineCitationText, InlineCitationCard (Trigger/Body), InlineCitationSource and InlineCitationQuote. Mirrors React InlineCitation from @gremorie/rx-ai.

items.name: ng-chain-of-thought
items.title: Chain of Thought (Angular)
items.description: Step-by-step reasoning trace - root container, clickable header, content panel, individual steps (complete/active/pending status), search-result chips and bounded image previews.

items.name: ng-sources
items.title: Sources (Angular)
items.description: Citation list for AI responses - collapsible container, header trigger ("Used {count} sources"), content panel and Source link items.

items.name: ng-task
items.title: Task (Angular)
items.description: Collapsible task card with file attachments - Task container, TaskTrigger header (search icon + title + chevron), TaskContent body with left-border list, TaskItem rows and TaskItemFile chips.

items.name: ng-tool
items.title: Tool (Angular)
items.description: State-machine card for AI SDK tool invocations - Tool container, ToolHeader with state badge (Pending/Running/Awaiting Approval/Responded/Completed/Error/Denied), ToolContent body, ToolInput (parameters JSON), ToolOutput (result or error).

items.name: ng-toolbar
items.title: Toolbar (Angular)
items.description: Generic action toolbar for AI message contexts - Toolbar row, ToolbarGroup (orientation-aware visually-grouped subset), ToolbarButton (with optional pressed toggle state).

items.name: ng-code-block
items.title: Code Block (Angular)
items.description: Shiki-highlighted code container with light/dark theme snapshots and an optional copy button. Mirrors the rx-ai implementation (github-light-default / github-dark-default).

items.name: ng-chart
items.title: Chart (Angular)
items.description: Headless chart engine for the Angular edition - chart-context, scales, axis, cartesian-grid, chart-frame, plus shape helpers (area, line, bar, scatter, pie, polar, radar, radial-bar). Shared base for every styled chart.

items.name: ng-area-chart
items.title: Area Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled area chart - cumulative quantity over a continuous domain. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-line-chart
items.title: Line Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled line chart - trends over a continuous domain. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-bar-chart
items.title: Bar Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled bar chart - categorical comparison. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-scatter-chart
items.title: Scatter Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled scatter chart - x/y distribution. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-pie-chart
items.title: Pie Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled pie chart - part-to-whole. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-radar-chart
items.title: Radar Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled radar chart - multi-axis comparison. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-radial-chart
items.title: Radial Chart (Angular)
items.description: Styled radial-bar chart - progress / gauge metaphor. Uses the ng-chart headless primitives.

items.name: ng-chart-tooltip
items.title: Chart Tooltip (Angular)
items.description: Standalone chart tooltip card - the floating popover the styled charts show on hover, reusable on its own. Presentational: pass the resolved label (category header) and rows (series); variants mirror React ChartTooltipContent (indicator dot/line/dashed, hideLabel, hideIndicator). Position via the chartTooltip directive from ng-chart.

items.name: ng-button-group
items.title: Button Group (Angular)
items.description: Cluster of related buttons that share a stroke - composable ButtonGroup, ButtonGroupText, ButtonGroupSeparator. Horizontal or vertical, with optional inner separator. Mirrors React ButtonGroup from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-calendar
items.title: Calendar (Angular)
items.description: Date grid built on Spartan-ng brain Calendar - single-date selection, month navigation, min/max bounds, full keyboard navigation. Pair with Popover for the canonical DatePicker pattern. Mirrors React Calendar from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-checkbox
items.title: Checkbox (Angular)
items.description: Binary checkbox built on Spartan-ng brain Checkbox. Use for multi-select lists, terms acceptance, settings toggles. For mutually exclusive choices use RadioGroup; for on/off use Switch. Mirrors React Checkbox from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-date-picker
items.title: Date Picker (Angular)
items.description: Composite of Popover + Calendar with Gremorie defaults - a trigger button showing the formatted date opens the calendar in a Spartan-ng brain popover. Single-mode by default. Mirrors React DatePicker from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

items.name: ng-form
items.title: Form (Angular)
items.description: Form field scaffolding for Angular forms - FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormDescription, FormMessage. Wires field state, validation errors, and accessibility attributes. Mirrors React Form (react-hook-form integration) from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-input
items.title: Input (Angular)
items.description: Input primitive for the Angular edition - single-line text field directive that adopts every native HTML `type`. Token-driven visual states. Mirrors React Input from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-input-group
items.title: Input Group (Angular)
items.description: Composable input layout - wraps Input or Textarea with inline / block addons (icons, buttons, kbd hints). Drives focus + invalid + disabled states from the inner control. Mirrors React InputGroup from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-input-otp
items.title: Input OTP (Angular)
items.description: One-time password input built on Spartan-ng brain InputOtp - keyboard-driven, paste-friendly, slot-based. Use for 2FA codes, magic links, SMS verification. Mirrors React InputOTP from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-label
items.title: Label (Angular)
items.description: Label primitive for the Angular edition - accessible caption for Input / form controls with disabled-state styling. Mirrors React Label from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-radio-group
items.title: Radio Group (Angular)
items.description: Mutually exclusive choice group built on Spartan-ng brain RadioGroup. Use for 2-7 distinct options. For binary on/off use Switch; for many options use Select. Mirrors React RadioGroup from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-select
items.title: Select (Angular)
items.description: Select primitive built on Spartan-ng brain Select - portalled, animated listbox with grouped items. For short fixed lists (5-30 options). Mirrors React Select from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-slider
items.title: Slider (Angular)
items.description: Range slider built on Spartan-ng brain Slider - single value with step + min/max. Use for continuous values (volume, opacity, price range). Mirrors React Slider from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-switch
items.title: Switch (Angular)
items.description: Binary on/off toggle built on Spartan-ng brain Switch. Use for instant-effect settings (dark mode, notifications). For form fields that need explicit "save", prefer Checkbox. Mirrors React Switch from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-textarea
items.title: Textarea (Angular)
items.description: Multi-line text field that auto-grows via `field-sizing: content`. Use for free-form input where rows are unknown ahead of time. Mirrors React Textarea from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-toggle
items.title: Toggle (Angular)
items.description: Two-state press-button built on Spartan-ng brain Toggle. Use for inline formatting controls (bold, italic) or visibility toggles. For multi-option clusters use ToggleGroup. Mirrors React Toggle from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group (Angular)
items.description: Mutually exclusive or multi-select cluster of Toggle items, built on Spartan-ng brain ToggleGroup. Use for inline option pickers (text alignment, view mode, filter chips). Mirrors React ToggleGroup from @gremorie/rx-forms.

items.name: ng-alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog (Angular)
items.description: Modal-blocking confirmation dialog built on Spartan-ng brain AlertDialog. Use for destructive confirmations and irreversible actions - the user must choose, no close-on-overlay or close-on-escape. Mirrors React AlertDialog from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

items.name: ng-command
items.title: Command (Angular)
items.description: Command palette primitive built on Spartan-ng brain Command - keyboard-first picker with input, list, groups, items and shortcuts, plus the floating Cmd+K dialog variant. Mirrors React Command (cmdk) from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

items.name: ng-context-menu
items.title: Context Menu (Angular)
items.description: Secondary action menu invoked via right-click, built on Spartan-ng brain menu primitives. Power-user accelerator with the same shape as DropdownMenu (items, groups, separators, sub-menus). Mirrors React ContextMenu from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

items.name: ng-dialog
items.title: Dialog (Angular)
items.description: Modal overlay anchored at viewport center, built on Spartan-ng brain Dialog. Use for focused decisions or short flows that need to interrupt the user context - confirmations, single-step forms, detail cards. Mirrors React Dialog from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

items.name: ng-drawer
items.title: Drawer (Angular)
items.description: Bottom-up sheet for mobile contexts, built on Spartan-ng brain Sheet with a slide-up animation and drag affordance. Best for mobile confirmations, quick actions, simple forms. Mirrors React Drawer (vaul) from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

items.name: ng-dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu (Angular)
items.description: DropdownMenu family built on Spartan-ng brain menu primitives - actions menu with checkbox / radio items, separators, nested submenus, destructive variant. Mirrors React DropdownMenu from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

items.name: ng-hover-card
items.title: Hover Card (Angular)
items.description: HoverCard primitive built on Spartan-ng brain HoverCard - non-interactive preview pane shown on hover. Use for link previews, profile cards, image teasers. Mirrors React HoverCard from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

items.name: ng-popover
items.title: Popover (Angular)
items.description: Anchored interactive content overlay built on Spartan-ng brain Popover. Triggers on click and hosts interactive content - date pickers, mini forms, share menus. Distinct from Tooltip (hover-only) and HoverCard (hover previews). Mirrors React Popover from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

items.name: ng-sheet
items.title: Sheet (Angular)
items.description: Side-anchored panel for longer flows, built on Spartan-ng brain Sheet with a directional slide animation. Use for filters, settings panels, multi-section edit forms. Mirrors React Sheet from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

items.name: ng-sonner
items.title: Sonner (Angular)
items.description: Toast notification root built on Spartan-ng brain Sonner with Gremorie tokens. Mount once at the app root - any descendant can fire a toast without an additional provider. For persistent in-flow messages use Alert; for critical confirmations use AlertDialog. Mirrors React Sonner from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

items.name: ng-tooltip
items.title: Tooltip (Angular)
items.description: Short non-essential context on hover/focus, built on Spartan-ng brain Tooltip. Reserve for non-critical supporting information - keyboard shortcuts, icon labels, "what does this do" hints. Mirrors React Tooltip from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

items.name: ng-breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb (Angular)
items.description: Hierarchical trail - composable Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator, BreadcrumbEllipsis. Use to show the current location within a nested structure. Mirrors React Breadcrumb from @gremorie/rx-navigation.

items.name: ng-menubar
items.title: Menubar (Angular)
items.description: Horizontal multi-menu bar - desktop-style File/Edit/View menus with keyboard navigation, sub-menus, checkbox and radio items. Mirrors React Menubar from @gremorie/rx-navigation.

items.name: ng-navigation-menu
items.title: Navigation Menu (Angular)
items.description: Top-level mega-menu - reveals secondary content panels on hover/focus. Use for site headers with grouped link clusters and feature highlights. Mirrors React NavigationMenu from @gremorie/rx-navigation.

items.name: ng-pagination
items.title: Pagination (Angular)
items.description: Page navigation surface - composable Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext, PaginationEllipsis. Anchor tags by default; integrates with the Angular router. Mirrors React Pagination from @gremorie/rx-navigation.

items.name: ng-sidebar
items.title: Sidebar (Angular)
items.description: Composable app-shell sidebar - provider, Sidebar, SidebarTrigger, SidebarMenu plus mobile drawer integration. Persisted collapsed state, keyboard shortcut, full keyboard navigation. The largest navigation primitive in the registry. Mirrors React Sidebar from @gremorie/rx-navigation.

items.name: ng-tabs
items.title: Tabs (Angular)
items.description: Tabbed content switcher built on Spartan-ng brain Tabs - Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent. Use for sibling content panels that share a context (settings sections, profile pages). Mirrors React Tabs from @gremorie/rx-navigation.

items.name: ng-accordion
items.title: Accordion (Angular)
items.description: Vertically stacked, coordinated expandable sections built on Spartan-ng brain Accordion. Use when multiple sections share a common rhythm (FAQ, settings groups). For a single expandable region, use Collapsible. Mirrors React Accordion from @gremorie/rx-display.

items.name: ng-avatar
items.title: Avatar (Angular)
items.description: User identity glyph - image with graceful fallback to initials or icon. Use for user surfaces (header, comments, mention chips, settings). Mirrors React Avatar from @gremorie/rx-display.

items.name: ng-collapsible
items.title: Collapsible (Angular)
items.description: Single-section expandable region built on Spartan-ng brain Collapsible. Minimal building block for "show more" toggles, sidebar group expand/collapse, inline disclosures. Mirrors React Collapsible from @gremorie/rx-display.

items.name: ng-separator
items.title: Separator (Angular)
items.description: Horizontal or vertical visual divider built on Spartan-ng brain Separator. Use sparingly - prefer spacing for visual grouping; reach for Separator only when a hard line carries semantic meaning. Mirrors React Separator from @gremorie/rx-display.

items.name: ng-table
items.title: Table (Angular)
items.description: Styled wrapper over native HTML `<table>` - composable Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableFooter, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCaption. Use for tabular data; pair with a data-grid library for sorting, filtering, virtualization. Mirrors React Table from @gremorie/rx-display.

items.name: ng-aspect-ratio
items.title: Aspect Ratio (Angular)
items.description: Reserves vertical space for media before content loads. Use on responsive images, iframes, video embeds, and skeleton placeholders to prevent cumulative layout shift. Mirrors React AspectRatio from @gremorie/rx-containers.

items.name: ng-resizable
items.title: Resizable (Angular)
items.description: Split panes with draggable handles built on Spartan-ng brain Resizable. Use for dev tools and pro apps (editors, email clients, file managers); consumer surfaces almost always read better with fixed proportions. Mirrors React Resizable from @gremorie/rx-containers.

items.name: ng-stack
items.title: Stack (Angular)
items.description: Vertical layout primitive - a flex-column container with consistent gap, align, and justify inputs. The right choice for any list flowing top-to-bottom (card contents, form sections, settings rows, vertical menus). Mirrors React Stack from @gremorie/rx-containers.

items.name: ng-artifact
items.title: Artifact (Angular)
items.description: Generic artifact card for AI-generated objects (code, doc, chart, image preview). ArtifactHeader + ArtifactTitle + ArtifactDescription + ArtifactActions + ArtifactAction + ArtifactClose + ArtifactContent. Use as the chrome wrapper for CodeBlock, WebPreview, Image, or any generated asset. Mirrors React Artifact from @gremorie/rx-artifacts.

items.name: ng-chart-artifact
items.title: Chart Artifact (Angular)
items.description: Chart artifact for AI-generated datasets - wraps any of the seven styled charts (bar, area, line, pie, radar, radial, scatter) in the Artifact chrome with a chart/table view toggle and an actions menu. Composes the ng-artifact chrome with the ng-data charts. Mirrors React ChartArtifact from @gremorie/rx-artifacts.

items.name: ng-web-preview
items.title: Web Preview (Angular)
items.description: Sandboxed browser preview for AI-generated sites. WebPreviewNavigation has back/forward/refresh, WebPreviewUrl is a navigable input, WebPreviewBody renders a sanitized iframe with the current URL, and WebPreviewConsole shows console logs below. Mirrors React WebPreview from @gremorie/rx-artifacts.

items.name: ng-checkpoint
items.title: Checkpoint (Angular)
items.description: Conversation savepoint marker. Renders a labeled bookmark with Separator on each side, plus a Tooltip explaining the state. Use to indicate revertable points in long agent runs. Mirrors React Checkpoint from @gremorie/rx-ai.

items.name: ng-confirmation
items.title: Confirmation (Angular)
items.description: Approval prompt for tool calls - ConfirmationRequest, ConfirmationDescription, and ConfirmationActions (Approve / Reject buttons). Designed for human-in-the-loop tool gates - emits approved/rejected with optional reason. Mirrors React Confirmation from @gremorie/rx-ai.

items.name: ng-context
items.title: Context (Angular)
items.description: Token usage display for AI conversations. ContextTrigger shows a circular progress glyph; on hover, ContextContent reveals input/output/total tokens, model max, and cost. Built on @spartan-ng/brain hover-card. Mirrors React Context from @gremorie/rx-ai.

items.name: ng-image
items.title: Image (Angular)
items.description: Tiny wrapper that renders a model-generated image (base64 + media type) as a data-URI . Use to display generated images returned from image-generation tool output. Mirrors React Image from @gremorie/rx-ai.

items.name: ng-model-selector
items.title: Model Selector (Angular)
items.description: Floating model picker dialog. ModelSelectorTrigger opens a command palette - input, groups, items, shortcuts - built on @spartan-ng/brain command. Use as a Cmd+K-style model switcher above the chat composer. Mirrors React ModelSelector from @gremorie/rx-ai.

items.name: ng-open-in-chat
items.title: Open in Chat (Angular)
items.description: Dropdown that opens the current page in an external chat (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, T3 Chat, ...). Provides preset providers and accepts custom entries. Built on @spartan-ng/brain popover. Mirrors React OpenInChat from @gremorie/rx-ai.

items.name: ng-plan
items.title: Plan (Angular)
items.description: Multi-step plan card with Shimmer-marked active step. PlanHeader + PlanTitle + PlanDescription describe the goal; PlanContent lists PlanStep items, each with status. PlanFooter holds CTA buttons (approve / regenerate). Composes Card + Shimmer. Mirrors React Plan from @gremorie/rx-ai.

items.name: ng-queue
items.title: Queue (Angular)
items.description: Pending message queue list shown above the prompt input. Each QueueMessage previews text + attachments; the user can dismiss or reorder. Mirrors React Queue from @gremorie/rx-ai.

items.name: ng-assistant
items.title: Assistant (Angular)
items.description: The flagship Gremorie chat surface: a thread/actions header, a streaming conversation with reasoning, an inline generated artifact, plus a floating B2B PromptInput composer (context picker, usage meter, mode/model selectors, attachments and voice). Mirrors the React Assistant block.

items.name: rx-utils
items.title: Utils (React)
items.description: Shared utilities for the React edition - cn() helper that merges Tailwind class names with conflict resolution (clsx + tailwind-merge).

items.name: rx-button
items.title: Button (React)
items.description: Button primitive for the React edition - 6 variants x 8 sizes (including icon-only), `asChild` via Radix Slot.

items.name: rx-input
items.title: Input (React)
items.description: Input primitive for the React edition - single-line text field that adopts every native HTML `type`. Token-driven visual states.

items.name: rx-label
items.title: Label (React)
items.description: Label primitive built on `@radix-ui/react-label` (via `radix-ui` namespace). Pair with Input / form controls.

items.name: rx-select
items.title: Select (React)
items.description: Select primitive built on Radix Select - portalled, animated listbox, grouped items, scroll buttons. For short fixed lists (5-30 options).

items.name: rx-textarea
items.title: Textarea (React)
items.description: Multi-line text field that auto-grows via `field-sizing: content`. Use for free-form input where rows are unknown ahead of time.

items.name: rx-input-group
items.title: Input Group (React)
items.description: Composable input layout - wraps Input or Textarea with inline / block addons (icons, buttons, kbd hints). Drives focus + invalid + disabled states from the inner control. Enables the InputGroupButton composition that powers PromptInput.

items.name: rx-dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu (React)
items.description: DropdownMenu family built on Radix DropdownMenu - actions menu with checkbox / radio items, separators, nested submenus, destructive variant.

items.name: rx-hover-card
items.title: Hover Card (React)
items.description: HoverCard primitive built on Radix HoverCard - non-interactive preview pane shown on hover. Use for link previews, profile cards, image teasers.

items.name: rx-dialog
items.title: Dialog (React)
items.description: Modal overlay anchored at viewport center, built on Radix Dialog. Use for focused decisions or short flows that need to interrupt the user context - confirmations, single-step forms, detail cards.

items.name: rx-sheet
items.title: Sheet (React)
items.description: Side-anchored panel for longer flows, built on Radix Dialog with a directional slide animation. Use for filters, settings panels, multi-section edit forms.

items.name: rx-popover
items.title: Popover (React)
items.description: Anchored interactive content overlay built on Radix Popover. Triggers on click and hosts interactive content - date pickers, mini forms, share menus. Distinct from Tooltip (hover-only) and HoverCard (hover previews).

items.name: rx-tooltip
items.title: Tooltip (React)
items.description: Short non-essential context on hover/focus, built on Radix Tooltip. Reserve for non-critical supporting information - keyboard shortcuts, icon labels, "what does this do" hints. Wrap your app root in `<TooltipProvider>` so all tooltips share a delay timer.

items.name: rx-command
items.title: Command (React)
items.description: Command palette primitive built on cmdk - inline picker (Combobox pattern) for keyboard-first navigation, plus CommandDialog for the canonical Cmd+K floating palette.

items.name: rx-alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog (React)
items.description: Modal-blocking confirmation dialog built on Radix AlertDialog. Use for destructive confirmations and irreversible actions - the user must choose, no close-on-overlay or close-on-escape.

items.name: rx-context-menu
items.title: Context Menu (React)
items.description: Secondary action menu invoked via right-click, built on Radix ContextMenu. Power-user accelerator with the same shape as DropdownMenu (items, groups, separators, sub-menus, checkbox/radio variants).

items.name: rx-drawer
items.title: Drawer (React)
items.description: Bottom-up sheet for mobile contexts, built on vaul. Slides up from the bottom by default with native gesture support (drag-to-dismiss, momentum). Best for mobile confirmations, quick actions, simple forms.

items.name: rx-sonner
items.title: Sonner (React)
items.description: Toast notification root, wraps `sonner` with Gremorie tokens. Mount once at the app root - any descendant can fire `toast()` without an additional provider. For transient feedback only - for persistent in-flow messages use Alert; for critical confirmations use AlertDialog.

items.name: rx-date-picker
items.title: Date Picker (React)
items.description: Composite of Popover + Calendar with Gremorie defaults. Single-mode by default. Lives in rx-overlays because it composes Popover (rx-overlays) with Button + Calendar (rx-forms).

items.name: rx-accordion
items.title: Accordion (React)
items.description: Vertically stacked, coordinated expandable sections built on Radix Accordion. Use when multiple sections share a common rhythm (FAQ, settings groups). For a single expandable region, use Collapsible.

items.name: rx-avatar
items.title: Avatar (React)
items.description: User identity glyph built on Radix Avatar - image with graceful fallback to initials or icon. Use for user surfaces (header, comments, mention chips, settings).

items.name: rx-badge
items.title: Badge (React)
items.description: Compact label for status, count, or category. Variants: default, secondary, destructive, outline. Supports `asChild` via Radix Slot for composition with links/buttons.

items.name: rx-card
items.title: Card (React)
items.description: Surface container for grouped content - composes CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter. The base building block for dashboards, lists, and modal-less detail views.

items.name: rx-carousel
items.title: Carousel (React)
items.description: Horizontal slider built on embla-carousel-react - touch / drag, keyboard navigation, pagination dots, prev/next controls. Best for hero rotators, image galleries, onboarding tours.

items.name: rx-collapsible
items.title: Collapsible (React)
items.description: Single-section expandable region built on Radix Collapsible. Minimal building block for "show more" toggles, sidebar group expand/collapse, inline disclosures.

items.name: rx-featured-icon
items.title: Featured Icon (React)
items.description: Icon inside a styled, themed container - the small badge that anchors a card, artifact, or empty-state header. Variants: color (primary, gray, success, error) x theme (light, solid, outline) x size (sm, md, lg, xl) x shape (square, circle). Token-driven so theme and dark mode flow through automatically.

items.name: rx-item
items.title: Item (React)
items.description: Flexible list-row primitive (compound) - media, title, description, and actions on one line. A single cascading `size` (lg/md/sm/none) drives media size and title/description typography at once; media variants icon/featured/avatar/image. Use for settings rows, file/resource lists, and selectable list items.

items.name: rx-separator
items.title: Separator (React)
items.description: Horizontal or vertical visual divider built on Radix Separator. Use sparingly - prefer spacing for visual grouping; reach for Separator only when a hard line carries semantic meaning.

items.name: rx-table
items.title: Table (React)
items.description: Styled wrapper over native HTML `<table>` - composable Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableFooter, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCaption. Use for tabular data; pair with a data-grid library for sorting, filtering, virtualization.

items.name: rx-aspect-ratio
items.title: Aspect Ratio (React)
items.description: Reserves vertical space for media before content loads - thin wrapper over Radix AspectRatio. Use on responsive images, iframes, video embeds, and skeleton placeholders to prevent cumulative layout shift.

items.name: rx-resizable
items.title: Resizable (React)
items.description: Split panes with draggable handles - ResizablePanelGroup + ResizablePanel + ResizableHandle on top of react-resizable-panels. Use for dev tools and pro apps (editors, email clients, file managers); consumer surfaces almost always read better with fixed proportions.

items.name: rx-scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area (React)
items.description: Themeable scroll container built on Radix ScrollArea - ScrollArea + ScrollBar. Reach for it when you need consistent scrollbar styling across OSs, or when the scrollbar lives inside a rounded card and the native bar would bleed outside the radius. Otherwise native scroll is fine.

items.name: rx-stack
items.title: Stack (React)
items.description: Vertical layout primitive - a `<div>` configured as flex column with consistent gap, align, and justify props. The right choice for any list flowing top-to-bottom (card contents, form sections, settings rows, vertical menus).

items.name: rx-alert
items.title: Alert (React)
items.description: Persistent in-flow feedback message - distinct from Sonner (transient) and AlertDialog (modal). Two variants (default, destructive); convey informational/success/warning via a leading icon rather than expanding variants.

items.name: rx-progress
items.title: Progress (React)
items.description: Determinate progress indicator (0-100) built on Radix Progress. Use when percent complete is known (uploads, multi-step forms, batch jobs); for unknown duration prefer Skeleton or a spinner.

items.name: rx-skeleton
items.title: Skeleton (React)
items.description: Placeholder block for loading states - a pulsing rectangle that reserves layout space so there is no shift when data arrives. Honors `prefers-reduced-motion` automatically.

items.name: rx-spinner
items.title: Spinner (React)
items.description: Indeterminate loading indicator - rotating Loader2 glyph in three sizes (sm, default, lg). Use when duration is unknown; use Progress when percent complete is known. Mirrors ng-spinner from the Angular edition.

items.name: rx-breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb (React)
items.description: Hierarchical trail - composable Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator, BreadcrumbEllipsis. Use to show the current location within a nested structure.

items.name: rx-menubar
items.title: Menubar (React)
items.description: Horizontal multi-menu bar built on Radix Menubar - desktop-style File/Edit/View menus with full keyboard navigation, sub-menus, checkbox and radio items.

items.name: rx-navigation-menu
items.title: Navigation Menu (React)
items.description: Top-level mega-menu built on Radix NavigationMenu - reveals secondary content panels on hover/focus. Use for site headers with grouped link clusters and feature highlights.

items.name: rx-pagination
items.title: Pagination (React)
items.description: Page navigation surface - composable Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext, PaginationEllipsis. Anchor tags by default; pass a custom component via PaginationLink for client-side routers.

items.name: rx-sidebar
items.title: Sidebar (React)
items.description: Composable app-shell sidebar - SidebarProvider, Sidebar, SidebarTrigger, SidebarMenu plus mobile drawer integration. Cookie-persisted collapsed state, keyboard shortcut, full keyboard navigation. The largest navigation primitive in the registry.

items.name: rx-tabs
items.title: Tabs (React)
items.description: Tabbed content switcher built on Radix Tabs - Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent. Use for sibling content panels that share a context (settings sections, profile pages).

items.name: rx-button-group
items.title: Button Group (React)
items.description: Cluster of related buttons that share a stroke. Composable ButtonGroup, ButtonGroupText, ButtonGroupSeparator. Horizontal or vertical, with optional inner Separator.

items.name: rx-calendar
items.title: Calendar (React)
items.description: Date grid built on react-day-picker - single or range selection, multi-month layout, weekday header, keyboard navigation. Pair with Popover for the canonical DatePicker pattern.

items.name: rx-checkbox
items.title: Checkbox (React)
items.description: Binary or tri-state checkbox built on Radix Checkbox. Use for multi-select lists, terms acceptance, settings toggles. For mutually exclusive choices use RadioGroup; for on/off use Switch.

items.name: rx-form
items.title: Form (React)
items.description: React Hook Form integration - Form, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormDescription, FormMessage. Wires field state, validation errors, and accessibility attributes.

items.name: rx-input-otp
items.title: Input OTP (React)
items.description: One-time password input built on input-otp - keyboard-driven, paste-friendly, slot-based. Use for 2FA codes, magic links, SMS verification.

items.name: rx-radio-group
items.title: Radio Group (React)
items.description: Mutually exclusive choice group built on Radix RadioGroup. Use for 2-7 distinct options. For binary on/off use Switch; for many options use Select.

items.name: rx-slider
items.title: Slider (React)
items.description: Range slider built on Radix Slider - single value or range (two thumbs), with step + min/max. Use for continuous values (volume, opacity, price range).

items.name: rx-switch
items.title: Switch (React)
items.description: Binary on/off toggle built on Radix Switch. Use for instant-effect settings (dark mode, notifications). For form fields that need explicit "save", prefer Checkbox.

items.name: rx-toggle
items.title: Toggle (React)
items.description: Two-state press-button built on Radix Toggle. Use for inline formatting controls (bold, italic) or visibility toggles. For multi-option clusters use ToggleGroup.

items.name: rx-toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group (React)
items.description: Mutually exclusive or multi-select cluster of Toggle items, built on Radix ToggleGroup. Use for inline option pickers (text alignment, view mode, filter chips).

items.name: rx-prompt-input
items.title: Prompt Input (React)
items.description: PromptInput family for AI chat surfaces - state machine, drag-drop, paste-to-attach, status-driven Submit. Full Bridge parity: InputGroup composition (InputGroupButton + InputGroupTextarea), ActionMenu (dropdown), ModelSelector (select), attachment HoverCard previews, Speech button (Web Speech API), Command palette wrappers, Cmd+K floating palette via CommandDialog, and Tabs panels.

items.name: rx-shimmer
items.title: Shimmer (React)
items.description: Animated text shimmer for streaming/loading hints. Uses motion (Framer Motion v12) to slide a gradient across text. Tiny dependency-free primitive used by Reasoning and Plan to mark "thinking" steps.

items.name: rx-suggestion
items.title: Suggestion (React)
items.description: Horizontal scrollable pills of prompt suggestions. Each Suggestion is a rounded Button - the Suggestions wrapper handles overflow with a hidden ScrollArea scrollbar. Use above the prompt input for starter prompts.

items.name: rx-message
items.title: Message (React)
items.description: Atomic chat message with role-aware layout (user right-aligned, assistant left). Composable surface: MessageContent + MessageResponse (Streamdown markdown), MessageAttachments + MessageAttachment, MessageToolbar with MessageActions, and MessageBranch + MessageBranchSelector + MessageBranchPrevious/Next for regeneration alternatives.

items.name: rx-conversation
items.title: Conversation (React)
items.description: Scroll-to-bottom container for chat messages. Uses use-stick-to-bottom under the hood: ConversationContent stays anchored to the bottom while new messages stream in. ConversationScrollButton appears when the user scrolls up and snaps back when clicked. ConversationEmptyState renders centered placeholder content.

items.name: rx-reasoning
items.title: Reasoning (React)
items.description: Collapsible "thinking" block for visible chain-of-thought. Auto-opens while isStreaming, tracks duration, auto-closes after streaming ends. ReasoningContent renders Streamdown markdown; ReasoningTrigger uses Shimmer to mark live thought.

items.name: rx-chain-of-thought
items.title: Chain of Thought (React)
items.description: Step-by-step reasoning visualizer. ChainOfThoughtStep renders each thought with status (pending/active/complete), icon, and optional ChainOfThoughtStepBody. Supports nested ChainOfThoughtSearch with Badge result chips. Wraps a Collapsible for show/hide.

items.name: rx-task
items.title: Task (React)
items.description: Collapsible item list for an agent task. TaskTrigger shows status + summary, TaskContent holds TaskItem children. TaskItemFile renders inline file badges (e.g. "edited app.tsx"). Use for multi-step tool-use traces in the conversation.

items.name: rx-tool
items.title: Tool (React)
items.description: Tool-use trace block. ToolHeader shows the tool name + state Badge (input-streaming, input-available, output-available, output-error). ToolContent reveals ToolInput (JSON params), ToolOutput (formatted result), and ToolErrors. Built on Collapsible + CodeBlock.

items.name: rx-sources
items.title: Sources (React)
items.description: Citations cluster for RAG responses. SourcesTrigger shows "N sources" toggle, SourcesContent reveals the list. Each Source is a hyperlink with optional favicon. Use to attribute model output to retrieved documents.

items.name: rx-inline-citation
items.title: Inline Citation (React)
items.description: Footnote-style inline citation marker. Hovers reveal a HoverCard with a Carousel of source cards (InlineCitationCard, InlineCitationCardTrigger, InlineCitationCardBody, InlineCitationSource, InlineCitationQuote). Use inside MessageResponse to cite passages mid-sentence.

items.name: rx-plan
items.title: Plan (React)
items.description: Multi-step plan card with Shimmer-marked active step. PlanHeader + PlanTitle + PlanDescription describe the goal; PlanContent lists PlanStep items, each with status. PlanFooter holds CTA Buttons (approve / regenerate). Built on Card + Collapsible.

items.name: rx-checkpoint
items.title: Checkpoint (React)
items.description: Conversation savepoint marker. Renders a labeled bookmark with Separator on each side, plus a Tooltip explaining the state. Use to indicate revertable points in long agent runs.

items.name: rx-confirmation
items.title: Confirmation (React)
items.description: Approval prompt for tool calls. Wraps an Alert with ConfirmationRequest, ConfirmationDescription, and ConfirmationActions (Approve / Reject Buttons). Designed for human-in-the-loop tool gates - exposes approved/rejected callbacks with optional reason.

items.name: rx-context
items.title: Context (React)
items.description: Token usage display for AI conversations. ContextTrigger shows a circular progress glyph; on hover, ContextContent reveals input/output/total tokens, model max, and cost via tokenlens. Uses Progress + HoverCard.

items.name: rx-attachments
items.title: Attachments (React)
items.description: Composable, standalone Attachment family for chat surfaces - Attachments container (grid | inline | list variants), Attachment item, AttachmentPreview, AttachmentInfo, AttachmentRemove, AttachmentHoverCard, and AttachmentEmpty, plus getMediaCategory / getAttachmentLabel utilities. Auto-detects image, video, audio, document and source media. Reusable across PromptInput and Message.

items.name: rx-queue
items.title: Queue (React)
items.description: Pending message queue list shown above the prompt input. Each QueueMessage previews text + attachments; the user can dismiss or reorder. Built on Collapsible + ScrollArea.

items.name: rx-model-selector
items.title: Model Selector (React)
items.description: Floating model picker dialog. ModelSelectorTrigger opens a Dialog containing a full Command palette - CommandInput, CommandGroup, CommandItem, CommandShortcut, CommandSeparator. Use as a Cmd+K-style model switcher above the chat composer.

items.name: rx-artifact
items.title: Artifact (React)
items.description: Generic artifact card for AI-generated objects (code, doc, chart, image preview). ArtifactHeader + ArtifactTitle + ArtifactDescription + ArtifactActions + ArtifactAction + ArtifactClose + ArtifactContent. Use as the chrome wrapper for CodeBlock, WebPreview, Image, or any generated asset.

items.name: rx-chart-artifact
items.title: Chart Artifact (React)
items.description: Chart artifact for AI-generated datasets - wraps any of the seven styled charts (bar, area, line, pie, radar, radial, scatter) in the Artifact chrome with a chart/table view toggle, themed FeaturedIcon, and an actions menu (copy, download, refresh). Composes the rx-artifact chrome with the rx-data charts.

items.name: rx-code-block
items.title: Code Block (React)
items.description: Syntax-highlighted code surface powered by shiki. Lazy-loads codeToHtml on mount; exposes CodeBlockCopyButton with copy/copied state. Pass code + language, optional showLineNumbers; ships dark + light themes by default.

items.name: rx-web-preview
items.title: Web Preview (React)
items.description: Sandboxed browser preview for AI-generated sites. WebPreviewNavigation has back/forward/refresh, WebPreviewUrl is a navigable Input, WebPreviewBody renders an iframe with the current URL, and WebPreviewConsole (Collapsible) shows console logs and errors below.

items.name: rx-canvas
items.title: Canvas (React)
items.description: ReactFlow canvas surface for visual workflows / agent graphs. Pre-configured for pan-on-scroll, drag-selection, and deletable nodes via Backspace/Delete. Wraps @xyflow/react ReactFlow + Background.

items.name: rx-connection
items.title: Connection (React)
items.description: Animated bezier-curve connection line component for @xyflow/react. Renders a smoothly curved path with a circle terminator while the user is dragging a new edge. Pass as the connectionLineComponent prop on Canvas.

items.name: rx-controls
items.title: Controls (React)
items.description: Styled wrapper around @xyflow/react Controls (zoom in/out, fit view, lock). Pre-themed to match Gremorie - rounded, bordered, secondary-tinted buttons. Drop inside a Canvas as a child for floating zoom controls.

items.name: rx-edge
items.title: Edge (React)
items.description: Edge variants for @xyflow/react: Temporary (simple-bezier curve for in-progress connections) and Animated (gradient-flowing bezier for active flows). Register via edgeTypes={{ temporary: Temporary, animated: Animated }} on Canvas.

items.name: rx-node
items.title: Node (React)
items.description: Card-based node for @xyflow/react graphs. Wraps Gremorie Card + CardHeader/Title/Description/Content/Footer/Action to give each node consistent chrome. Accepts handles { target, source } booleans to declare which sides expose connection Handles.

items.name: rx-panel
items.title: Panel (React)
items.description: Floating positioned panel inside a @xyflow/react Canvas. Pre-themed - bordered, rounded, card-tinted, padded - for stacking minimap, layers, or context controls in a corner of the workflow.

items.name: rx-toolbar
items.title: Toolbar (React)
items.description: Per-node floating toolbar (NodeToolbar from @xyflow/react). Anchored below the node by default - use for context actions on selection (delete, duplicate, configure).

items.name: rx-image
items.title: Image (React)
items.description: Tiny wrapper that renders an Experimental_GeneratedImage (Vercel AI SDK) as a data-URI . Use to display model-generated images returned from generateImage() / experimental tool output.

items.name: rx-open-in-chat
items.title: Open in Chat (React)
items.description: Dropdown that opens the current page in an external chat (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, T3 Chat, ...). Provides preset providers (github, chatgpt, claude, gemini, t3) and accepts custom OpenInChatItem entries.

items.name: rx-chart
items.title: Chart (React)
items.description: The chart primitive for the React edition - ChartContainer (responsive frame + per-series CSS color vars), ChartTooltip / ChartTooltipContent, ChartLegend / ChartLegendContent, useChart, and the ChartConfig / ChartDatum types. Built on recharts; the shared base every styled chart composes.

items.name: rx-chart-tooltip
items.title: Chart Tooltip (React)
items.description: ChartTooltip + ChartTooltipContent - the card-surface hover tooltip for the React charts, published as a standalone name. Alias item: the implementation ships inside the rx-chart primitive (chart.tsx), so installing this pulls rx-chart and adds no extra files.

items.name: rx-area-chart
items.title: Area Chart (React)
items.description: Styled area chart - cumulative quantity over a continuous domain. Composes the rx-chart primitive with recharts.

items.name: rx-line-chart
items.title: Line Chart (React)
items.description: Styled line chart - trends over a continuous domain. Composes the rx-chart primitive with recharts.

items.name: rx-bar-chart
items.title: Bar Chart (React)
items.description: Styled grouped bar chart - compare values across categories with one bar per series in each band. Composes the rx-chart primitive with recharts.

items.name: rx-scatter-chart
items.title: Scatter Chart (React)
items.description: Styled scatter chart - show correlation between a numeric X field and one or more Y series. Composes the rx-chart primitive with recharts.

items.name: rx-pie-chart
items.title: Pie Chart (React)
items.description: Styled pie / donut chart - parts of a whole, one slice per data row. Composes the rx-chart primitive with recharts.

items.name: rx-radar-chart
items.title: Radar Chart (React)
items.description: Styled radar chart - compare series across multiple axes that share a radial domain. Composes the rx-chart primitive with recharts.

items.name: rx-radial-chart
items.title: Radial Chart (React)
items.description: Styled radial bar chart - concentric rings, one per data row, each sweep proportional to its value. Composes the rx-chart primitive with recharts.

items.name: block-sign-in
items.title: Sign-in block
items.description: Authentication card with a GitHub provider above an email/password field group. Composes Card, Button, Separator, Label, and Input.

items.name: block-dashboard
items.title: Dashboard block
items.description: Analytics surface: four KPI cards, a revenue bar chart, and a recent-transactions table. Composes Card, Badge, Table, BarChart, and Button.

items.name: block-assistant
items.title: Assistant block
items.description: The flagship Gremorie chat surface: a thread/actions header, a streaming conversation with reasoning, an inline generated artifact, sources and response branches, plus a floating B2B PromptInput composer (context picker, usage meter, mode/model selectors, attachments and voice).

items.name: block-settings-form
items.title: Settings form block
items.description: Settings page: Profile, Notifications, and Appearance cards with a sticky save bar. Composes Card, Avatar, Input, Label, Switch, Slider, and Button.

items.name: block-empty-state
items.title: Empty state block
items.description: Empty-state pattern: dashed-border container, centered icon medallion, headline, description, and dual CTA. Composes Button + lucide icons.

items.name: artifact-chart-bar
items.title: Chart (bar) artifact
items.description: Bar chart artifact rendering a schema-driven dataset emitted by the model. Composes BarChart (rx-data) with Card + Badge for framing.

items.name: artifact-code-block
items.title: Code block artifact
items.description: Syntax-highlighted code artifact with copy-to-clipboard. Composes CodeBlock (rx-ai) with Card + Badge for framing.

items.name: artifact-markdown-doc
items.title: Markdown document artifact
items.description: Document artifact rendering streamed Markdown with prose typography. Composes Card + Badge with a prose article wrapper.

items.name: artifact-data-table
items.title: Data table artifact
items.description: Filterable table artifact rendering JSON rows. Composes Table (rx-display) with Input filter, Badge status, and lucide Search icon.

items.name: artifact-form-schema
items.title: Form (schema) artifact
items.description: Form artifact generated from a JSON field schema with submit. Composes Input, Checkbox, Label, Button (rx-forms) with Card + Badge.

items.name: artifact-calculator
items.title: Calculator artifact
items.description: Interactive tool-call artifact with editable inputs, operator toggle, and live result. Composes Input, Label, Button (rx-forms) with Card + Badge.
